'''âf-j-z-k''' ('''kafajzekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anatomise|anatomise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-j-z-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anatomise|anatomise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-j-z-k
|-
! Lemma
| kafajzekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifajzekoko|thifajzekoko]] || [[word:jifajzekoko|jifajzekoko]] || [[word:shifajzekoko|shifajzekoko]] || [[word:kifajzekoko|kifajzekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
